Fix neo4j container startup failure caused by read-only volume mount

mounted separately in the neo4j-init sidecar container.

commit.message:
Convert barrel exports to named exports for better tree-shaking (#33)

* Fix Turbopack ownKeys proxy error by using explicit named exports

Replace `export *` barrel re-exports with explicit named exports in
src/index.ts. Turbopack calls Object.seal(exports) after loading ESM
modules, which conflicts with the Proxy created for `export *` re-exports
— the Proxy's ownKeys trap returns keys absent from the non-extensible
target, violating JavaScript's Proxy invariant.

Fixes #32

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CRJmnqv29dhAtyKafYxv6F

* Add package-lock.json generated during build

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CRJmnqv29dhAtyKafYxv6F

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
docs: add plan for removing queue song TTL

Queue hashes currently use a 24h TTL that causes ghost entry bugs when
the system is paused. This plan proposes removing TTL in favor of
explicit cleanup in kill_song(), nuke_queue(), and master_player().

commit.message:
fix: simplify vercel.json to use outputDirectory for Hono zero-config

Vercel's Hono builder checks outputDirectory first for a pre-built
entry point. By setting outputDirectory to "dist", it picks up the
tsdown bundle (dist/index.mjs) directly. Removes functions block
and rewrites — Vercel handles routing automatically.

Fix claude-usage: fail sentinel prevents API hammering on cold start

After reboot, empty cache + tmux status-interval 1 caused sequential API
calls every ~5s (curl timeout), triggering Cloudflare's IP penalty box.

blocking recovery. Also fix unsafe shift 2 under set -euo pipefail.

commit.message:
refactor: harden speaker mutation rules + confidence + archived labels

speakerGuard.ts:
- Introduce MutationType union (label, color, attribution, state_source,
  confidence) — every pipeline phase must declare intent before writing
- Introduce GuardResult {allowed, reason} for structured responses
- Rename core function to canMutateSpeaker; three invariants are now
  explicit in JSDoc: manual wins, is_user_edited=1 blocks all automation,
  unknown speaker is unrestricted
- Keep canOverrideSpeaker as @deprecated alias for pipeline backward compat

speakers.ts PATCH:
- Add speaker_confidence = 1.0 to transcript_lines UPDATE on manual rename;
  a human decision is always maximum confidence

WorkspacePage.tsx:
- Document end_ms Phase 1 convention inline: end_ms = next segment start,
  approximate; future VAD-based refinement will replace this
- archivedSpeakerMap useMemo: builds label/color map from viewingSession.speakers
- Session modal transcript: show speaker turn labels (● Voice/Name in
  color) when speaker data is present, so archived sessions are consistent
  with what the user saw live

"quarterly" is not a valid sitemap changefreq value per the protocol.

commit.message:
feat(e2e): storageState auth caching — eliminate per-test login (#1091)

* feat(e2e): add storageState auth caching — eliminate per-test login overhead

Log in once per role (admin, member, technician) via Playwright setup
project and cache browser state to disk. Tests opt in via
test.use({ storageState: STORAGE_STATE.<role> }).

Key changes:
- Add auth-setup Playwright project with loginAndSave() for each role
- Migrate 10 spec files from loginAs/ensureLoggedIn to storageState
- Fix signOut scope: change from global (revokes ALL sessions) to local
  (revokes only current browser) — prevents storageState poisoning when
  other tests call logout()
- Add x-skip-autologin header to all E2E requests via extraHTTPHeaders
  to prevent silent auth fallback masking test failures
- Bump token_verifications rate limit for local dev
- Update E2E skill docs with storageState-first patterns

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(e2e): isolate change-password test with ephemeral users

Uses createTestUser in beforeAll instead of shared seeded member@test.com.
Two separate temp users prevent parallel test conflicts under fullyParallel.
Removes the password-restore cleanup step (user is deleted in afterAll).

Fixes CI Gate failure where signOut(global) after password change was
revoking the storageState session used by dashboard and profile-settings tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
Fix CORS preflight by matching OPTIONS on newsletter route

Route::post() didn't match OPTIONS requests, so Laravel's default
handler responded without CORS headers, causing browser network errors.
Changed to Route::match(['post', 'options']) so the NewsletterCors
middleware handles the preflight properly.

fix(sales): test-drive-handoff auth — use x-closeloop-secret not Bearer token

Bug: elevenlabs-webhook called test-drive-handoff with Authorization: Bearer token
but test-drive-handoff requires x-closeloop-secret header (requireInternalSecret).
This caused every test-drive notification to fail silently — owner never received
SMS/email/webhook when a test drive was booked via AI.

Fix: use x-closeloop-secret header matching what test-drive-handoff expects.

- Add wire:target to scope loading indicators to the clicked button only
- Invalidate computed workItems cache after close/reopen on index page
- Refresh model and dismiss modal after close on show page

- Add tests for close/reopen on show page

Closes #133

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: value-residual connections for improved gradient flow (#128)

Gemma 2-style value-residual: first layer's V projection is blended
into subsequent layers' V via v = (1-λ)*v_current + λ*v_first.
Controlled by ModelConfig.value_residual_mix (default 0.0 = disabled).
Uses module attributes (like aux_loss) to keep forward(x)->x signature.

Co-authored-by: Lumi <agent@example.com>

  - useControlledArray<T>() replaces ~25 lines of parent-sync boilerplate per component
  - useEditState<F>() replaces inline edit state management (~35 lines each)
  - useAddNew() replaces add-new-item state management (~25 lines each)
- Refactor all 7 entry components to use shared hooks
- Fix projection subtitle missing mortgage/debt in expenses calculation
- Add wizard reorder and contextual help tasks (168-174) to TASKS.md

commit.message:
Add smart learning features: level detection, 3 new modes, stats dashboard

Phase 1: Enhanced server.js prompts
- Level detection (CEFR) runs first, calibrates all other prompts
- Verbs prompt now adds conjugations for tenses the learner is ready for
- Vocab prompt generates 30-40 supplementary words (numbers, colors, directions, months)
- Exercises bumped to 20-25 items per type with difficulty tags (easy/medium/hard)
- New reading prompt generates 20 comprehension sentences

Phase 2: New training modes in index.html
- Frase do Dia: daily sentence card above mode grid, tap to reveal translation
- Leitura: reading practice with self-rating (Easy/OK/Hard) + grammar notes
- Ouvir: listening mode using browser SpeechSynthesis (pt-BR), type what you hear

Phase 3: Smart learning features
- Per-mode stats tracking (each mode has its own accuracy)
- Weak word tracking in localStorage (error rate + recency)
- weightedPick() for spaced repetition (wrong items appear more often)
- Stats dashboard panel with per-mode accuracy bars + top 10 weakest words
- CEFR level badge displayed in header
- Difficulty badges on reading sentences

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: generate workflow for every .odx file — no dedup by class name (1.0.37)

Same-named orchestrations are NOT necessarily backup copies — they may be
legitimate copies of actions needed at different points in the flow.
Per Sandro: every .odx file should produce a workflow.

- Remove seenOrchNames dedup check that skipped same-named orchestrations
- When class names collide, fall back to filename-derived workflow name
- Counter suffix (_2, _3...) handles rare filename collisions too
- Add node:path basename import for filename derivation

Result — ReturnedMail:
  Before: 4 workflows (2 unique orchestrations + 2 pipelines)
  After:  6 workflows (4 orchestrations + 2 pipelines) ✓ matches Sandro's expectation

feat(streaming): POST cumulative chunks during LLM generation

Instead of buffering the full response and POSTing once, stream
cumulative content to bot/message as chunks arrive from OpenClaw.
Uses the same chunking strategy as Dyad's Gemini adapter: POST at
500+ chars, paragraph breaks at 100+, or 5s timeout. Final POST
with is_final=true triggers bot/process server-side.

commit.message:
Fix tab highlighting for issue detail pages in BottomTabBar (#1089)

* fix: highlight Issues tab when viewing an issue detail page

Issue detail pages (/m/[initials]/i/[number]) are nested under the /m
route for URL structure, but should activate the Issues tab in the
bottom nav bar — not Machines. Added regex detection for the /i/ segment
to override the prefix match, plus unit tests for both cases.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01UupPjocBnHgXRPnAw5MqBk

* fix(BottomTabBar): fix mock leak and regex for no-trailing-slash issue paths

- Add beforeEach that resets usePathname mock to /dashboard so overrides
  in individual tests do not leak into subsequent tests
- Update isIssuePage regex from /\/i\// to /\/i(\/|$)/ so that paths
  like /m/BB/i (no trailing slash) are correctly identified as issue pages
- Add regression test for the /m/BB/i (no trailing slash) case

commit.message:
Fix YAML syntax error in generate-documents workflow

Multi-line --body strings in run: | blocks caused a parse error because
unindented content (markdown headers, list items, bare text) terminates
YAML block scalars. Fixed by writing the PR body and issue comment to
temp files via heredocs and passing them with --body-file.

Also restricts the /generate-docs trigger to OWNER only (was previously
OWNER, MEMBER, or COLLABORATOR).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Unify weight initialization UI into single radio group

Replace three scattered mechanisms (usePretrainedCheck, continueTrainingCheck,
MuViT handler file picker) with a single WeightInitStrategy radio group in
a "Weight Initialization" TitledPane. Each handler declares its supported
strategies via ClassifierHandler interface defaults.

- Add WeightInitStrategy enum and default methods to ClassifierHandler
- Override strategies in MuViTHandler (scratch/MAE/continue, no backbone)
- Move MAE encoder file picker from MuViTHandler UI to dialog radio group
- Extract shared buildTrainingConfig() used by buildResult() and copyTrainingScript()
- Remove mutual exclusion listeners and post-build handler override hack
